## registerProfileFlags() function

Register profile flags (--config, --device-name, --project-name). Use this for project-aware plugins that resolve a CLI config profile.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function registerProfileFlags<T>(
  pluginYargs: Argv<T>,
): Argv<T & ProfileFlags>
```
